section_name: Application for and Issuance of License
text: The board by rule may provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.102 — Application for and Issuance of License

The board by rule may provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.

*Added by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290 (H.B.2017), Sec. 40, eff. September 1, 2011.*

subsections.text: The board by rule may provide for the filing of a license application and the issuance of a license by electronic means.
